# OKLM — Open Keyboard Layout Model

> An open model to describe, validate and export keyboard layouts: one human-maintainable source of truth, exported to LDML, operating systems, hardware legends and documentation.

OKLM is a public draft (0.1), not yet a published or adopted standard. It does not compete with Unicode CLDR/LDML Keyboard: LDML Keyboard is the standards-oriented interchange export; OKLM is the source model and tooling layer around it. Canonical format: JSON, extension `.oklm.json`. Licenses: EUPL 1.2 (schemas, validators, tools) and CC BY 4.0 (documentation).

## Documentation

- [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AZERTYGlobal/oklm/main/README.md): project overview and goals
- [SPEC](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AZERTYGlobal/oklm/main/SPEC.md): manifest specification, draft 0.1
- [CONVERSIONS](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AZERTYGlobal/oklm/main/CONVERSIONS.md): conversion rules and conversion reports
- [CLDR-LDML](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AZERTYGlobal/oklm/main/CLDR-LDML.md): relationship with Unicode CLDR/LDML Keyboard
- [GOVERNANCE](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AZERTYGlobal/oklm/main/GOVERNANCE.md): project governance
- [ROADMAP](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AZERTYGlobal/oklm/main/ROADMAP.md): planned milestones
- [INDUSTRY-ADOPTION](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AZERTYGlobal/oklm/main/INDUSTRY-ADOPTION.md): adoption targets across the keyboard ecosystem

## Schemas and examples

- [Manifest JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AZERTYGlobal/oklm/main/schemas/oklm-manifest.schema.json): OKLM manifest 0.1
- [Conversion report JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AZERTYGlobal/oklm/main/schemas/oklm-conversion-report.schema.json): conversion report 0.2
- [Example manifests](https://github.com/AZERTYGlobal/oklm/tree/main/examples): AZERTY Global (full and minimal), AZERTY AFNOR, BÉPO, traditional AZERTY, QWERTY US
- Live manifests served on this site, for example: https://oklm.org/manifests/azerty-global.oklm.json

## Exporters

One-way exporters with conversion reports are available in [tools/](https://github.com/AZERTYGlobal/oklm/tree/main/tools): OKLM to LDML Keyboard 3.0, OKLM to xkb (levels 1-4), OKLM to macOS keylayout. Reference exports are committed under [examples/exports/](https://github.com/AZERTYGlobal/oklm/tree/main/examples/exports).

## Website

- [oklm.org](https://oklm.org/): interactive demo rendered from the real manifests, exporters overview, project status
- Related project: [AZERTY Global](https://azerty.global/), the French keyboard layout that motivated OKLM
